creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-04-26 23:34:53 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/gecko-mediaplayer Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Gecko Media Player is a browser plugin that uses GNOME MPlayer
  to play media in a browser. It should  work with all browsers
  on Unix-ish systems (Linux, BSD, Solaris) and use the NS4 API
  (Mozilla, Firefox, Opera, etc.).
  
  WWW: http://kdekorte.googlepages.com/gecko-mediaplayer
  
  PR:             ports/134009
  Submitted by:   Alexander Logvinov <ports at logvinov.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2336    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +59 -0     ports/www/gecko-mediaplayer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/gecko-mediaplayer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/gecko-mediaplayer/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/www/gecko-mediaplayer/pkg-plist (new)
